game_info.title: "Freedom Together",
game_info.concept: **7 Days to End with You:** Players are presented with a character speaking an unknown language within a confined environment, where the core mechanic involves deducing word meanings. By tapping on interactive objects in the room, players reveal single words in the unknown language, which they then associate with context and manually input a guessed translation into a persistent personal dictionary via a dedicated UI. The game progresses over a fixed 7-day in-game period, with time advancing after specific interactions, and the narrative branches significantly based on the player's interpreted word meanings, influencing character reactions and story outcomes. There are no traditional win/loss conditions; instead, the objective is to gradually understand the language to uncover one of multiple narrative endings within the 7-day cycle. The game encourages multiple playthroughs, allowing players to reset their interpretations and explore different story paths and conclusions.
game_info.description: You find yourself in a mysterious room with a character speaking an unknown language. Over the next 7 in-game days, you must learn their language by clicking on objects to reveal words, then building your own dictionary by typing translations. Your interpretations shape the story and lead to different endings. Explore, experiment, and discover the truth hidden in language.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between interactive objects and UI elements
Space: Interact with highlighted object or confirm dictionary entry
Z: Open/Close dictionary interface
Shift: Clear current text input
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (returns to title screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and object interaction mechanics. Validates that the player can navigate between objects, interact with them to reveal words, and that the game state properly tracks discovered words and day progression.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Systematically cycle through all interactive objects in the room, interacting with each one to reveal words. Verify that words are added to the discovered list and that interactions advance time appropriately.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully interact with all objects, reveal multiple words in the unknown language, advance through at least 2 in-game days, and verify that the game tracks all interactions without errors.
TEST_1.description: Tests basic movement and object interaction mechanics. Validates that the player can navigate between objects, interact with them to reveal words, and that the game state properly tracks discovered words and day progression.
TEST_1.strategy: Systematically cycle through all interactive objects in the room, interacting with each one to reveal words. Verify that words are added to the discovered list and that interactions advance time appropriately.
TEST_1.expected: Successfully interact with all objects, reveal multiple words in the unknown language, advance through at least 2 in-game days, and verify that the game tracks all interactions without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete game loop including dictionary creation and reaching a narrative ending. Validates that players can learn words, create meaningful dictionary entries, and progress through all 7 days to reach one of the story endings.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Interact with objects to discover words, systematically create dictionary entries with plausible translations, engage with the character through dialogue choices, and progress through all 7 days by making consistent interpretation choices.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully reach day 7, complete the full story cycle, trigger a narrative ending based on dictionary interpretations, and achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state, demonstrating full game completion.
TEST_2.description: Tests the complete game loop including dictionary creation and reaching a narrative ending. Validates that players can learn words, create meaningful dictionary entries, and progress through all 7 days to reach one of the story endings.

TEST_2.expected: Successfully reach day 7, complete the full story cycle, trigger a narrative ending based on dictionary interpretations, and achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state, demonstrating full game completion.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests alternate interpretation paths and narrative branching. Validates that different dictionary translations lead to different story outcomes and character reactions.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Create a dictionary with intentionally different translations than TEST_2, focusing on opposite interpretations where possible, and observe how the character's dialogue and story events change based on these interpretations.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Experience different dialogue responses, alternative story events, and reach a different narrative ending than TEST_2, proving that player interpretations meaningfully affect the game's branching narrative.
